positive: A celestial map illustration depicting constellations and mythical zodiac signs (e.g., the Lion, the Archer). The style is dark academia mixed with astronomical diagramming, featuring antique parchment texture, gold foil accents, and delicate hand-drawn lines. Highly detailed, academic poster art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements
